channel.title: Posts on KinnikuGlow
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on KinnikuGlow

item.title: Best Gyms in Tokyo for Beginners (2026) — From Budget to Premium
item.description: A no-BS guide to the best gyms in Tokyo for beginners — including budget public gyms from ¥300, beginner-friendly chains, and English-friendly options for expats and working women.
